'''chatama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicarbazin|nicarbazin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicarbazin|nicarbazin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chatama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chætæmæth|chætæmæth]] || [[word:chætæmæj|chætæmæj]] || [[word:chætæmæsh|chætæmæsh]] || [[word:chætæmæ|chætæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatatamath|chatatamath]] || [[word:chatatamaj|chatatamaj]] || [[word:chatatamash|chatatamash]] || [[word:chatatama|chatatama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatamath|chatamath]] || [[word:chatamaj|chatamaj]] || [[word:chatamash|chatamash]] || [[word:chatama|chatama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatafmath|chatafmath]] || [[word:chatafmaj|chatafmaj]] || [[word:chatafmash|chatafmash]] || [[word:chatafmaf|chatafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chatamatha|chatamatha]] || [[word:chatamaja|chatamaja]] || [[word:chatamasha|chatamasha]] || [[word:chatamaka|chatamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chatamath|chatamath]] || [[word:chatamaj|chatamaj]] || [[word:chatamash|chatamash]] || [[word:chatama|chatama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chatamathal|chatamathal]] || [[word:chatamajal|chatamajal]] || [[word:chatamashal|chatamashal]] || [[word:chatamakal|chatamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chatamathatha|chatamathatha]] || [[word:chatamajaja|chatamajaja]] || [[word:chatamashasha|chatamashasha]] || [[word:chatamaka|chatamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chatamathan|chatamathan]] || [[word:chatamajan|chatamajan]] || [[word:chatamashan|chatamashan]] || [[word:chatamakan|chatamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chatamathaoro|chatamathaoro]] || [[word:chatamajaoro|chatamajaoro]] || [[word:chatamashaoro|chatamashaoro]] || [[word:chatamakaoro|chatamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
